reviews.review_description:
I was looking for an old west shooting game, and this was the best I found.  When this game is finished, I think this will be a really great game that sticks with the old west theme.  Needs more locations and good old-fashioned duels but for what it is now and for free it's fun.  
The multiplayer portion needs something to stop guys from just running as fast as they can shooting up everything in their way.  They don't seem to like to use any strategy other than blast everything like crazy men.  I prefer to go up against the A.I. in multiplayer than other real people. 
More scenes like in the old west movies.

UPDATE: It's been five years since it was first released and nothing has been done with it.  I can't even get into the game anymore because it requires a password that I cannot remember after all this time.  I actually enjoyed this game and was waiting for it to be finished, but it looks like they just gave up. I played it on my Q2 a few years ago but can't get it on my Q3 and the details now say Rift and Rift S (only) You also cannot find this in the meta store; you have to go through Side Quest and then into the Meta Store to find it. I lowered my rating because of all this.
I've just got the game and spent a good while on it just waiting for an online game to load, however after five to ten minutes of waiting I gave up and wrote this review.

I played the game and it started off fun but then I tried to play with one of my friends and it wouldn't let me I then tried to go in to quick match and that also wouldn't work and the only mode that worked was single player and that was a lot of fun but I'm a bit disappointed that the multiplayer wouldn't work. It was a great game though and my only issue was multiplayer so if your trying to find a fun game to play on the quest I definitely recommend this

developer_response.body: To download the game all you need to do is add it to your library by clicking the "Free" button on the product page, then it will appear in your library in your headset and you can simply click on the game to install it from there. Also, in the future please reach out to us at admin@pixelframers.com for support, as we're typically not able to address support related questions via product reviews. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I love the games development so far and it has a lot of potential. what would push it forward is the ability to have more then one friend play at a time in gunfights such as a all vs all with 2 or more people or 2v2 etc…

reviews.review_title: So much fun and more improvements coming
reviews.review_description: I'm leaving room for adding a star due to the potential this game has. It is already extremely fun, especially the multiplayer. The bullet time makes each fight different and incorporates strategy every time. The single player missions are fun, and have recently gotten an update for difficulty settings which makes them even more accessible. The developer has so many more ideas coming down the pipe, I can't wait to see where it goes. And I'm glad the dev is so in touch with the community

This game is super fun and awesome like it's cool to play online but the thing is that bugs me is that I have stick drift and I need to find a setting to switch controllers but put that aside, this game is amazing
it took awile to join a mach but any way it was fun
Worst game don’t get.

reviews.review_title: Awesome game, needs a bit of work in the
reviews.review_description: Really fun game but the tracking seems a bit off in the beta.
Please get this game it has genuinely amazing mechanics and definitely needs more attention from the community.

So y’all should add the reload I like the reload but can y’all make it a little more realistic like the reloads that’s all I want to be realistic also can y’all add more maps it will be fun well that’s all I gotta say so bye

reviews.review_title: Super close to a great game
reviews.review_description: Ok that whole first mission diologe and sorta story was really neat and I really enjoyed that. It would be really cool if you could do that with  the other ones and yes I know it’s ambitious but it would be great. Also a couple more levels won’t hurt
Not very good. Poor gun physics and controls.

You get a feel of the old West complete with campfire, night stars, Saloon town,Train and a abandoned goldmine. You better be quick on the draw in this game ( I would have never made it as a gun fighting cowpoke). Learning to shoot and actually hit something is not so easy. Would like to see some trace on the fired bullets, It’s hard to tell if you hit a target.
Would be nice if I can hear the footsteps (with Spurs) of the cowboy sneaking up on me from behind! Maybe have a multiplayer with 3 on 3 max. Fun game
Open the game. Ask to create account. Close the game. Uninstall. I already have an oculus account. Why I do need to create another one? Also make it so annoying with such a small keyboard!

developer_response.body: Thanks for downloading War Yards Beta! The game requires account registration at this time for two reasons. First, as a cross-platform game, we need to use a unified account system to make it easy for players to play with each other from across all different platforms. Secondly, as a free beta program, we need to be able to reach out to players in order to collect feedback on their experience. If you'd like assistance with account creation, please e-mail us at admin@pixelframers.com and we'd be more than happy to make an account for you. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Like the artstyle the game idea the introduction and train mission was cool more like that with story.

Aiming with pistols is hard. Is there a way to turn down hand tracking sensitivity as holding the gun stead to aim seemed tricky. Ended up shooting loads of rounds to make sure I hit the enemies lol

Keep going with, would happily back this.

Many thanks

Wow, always wondered how it would be to play in a western movie, now I know, bullet time is perfect to mimic and have fun shooting out the outlaws! Really comfortable to play and you get used in no time! Really recommend it!

Just in case you need it ;)

This game give you the red dead vibes
